Crossings

Game Mode
  • Orientation
  • Minimum Distance from Corners
  • Median/Island
  • Flashing Green Period
Code Reference

B.5.8.
The flashing green period required for persons with disabilities shall be determined on the basis of a walking speed of 900 mm/sec. rather than 1200 mm/sec., which is what is normally used. The minimum period for the steady green (for pedestrians) shall be the crossing distance times 900 mm/sec. (Refer to Traffic Engineering Center Guidelines for Pedestrians with Disabilities).
